title: Multi-Column Headers
excerpt: It would be great if there was a way to add headers to groups of multiple columns so that if multiple columns are related they can be labelled with how they’re related. For example if you have 3 check mark columns that a…

posts.author: Speters (Sabreena)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if there was a way to add headers to groups of multiple columns so that if multiple columns are related they can be labelled with how they’re related. For example if you have 3 check mark columns that are indicate potential equipment available in a location, you could put a header that spans all 3 that says “Equipment Available” and then the individual columns would reference a certain type of equipment.
